tasks.subject: Task 1: Config.spec + Config.params pydantic fields
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add two new top-level fields to `Config` (`spec: dict[str, Any] = {}`, `params: dict[str, Any] = {}`) and lock down YAML round-trip behavior.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/config.py:14` (add `Any` to typing import); `src/kinoforge/core/config.py:415` (add two fields after `store: StoreConfig`)
- Test: `tests/core/test_config.py` (append 4 new tests at end of file)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- YAML without spec/params blocks loads with both as {}
- YAML with `spec: {model: "X"}` + `params: {fps: 24}` populates cfg.spec/cfg.params verbatim
- Nested dict/list/float/int types preserved through load (no string coercion)
- `cfg.model_dump()` round-trip equality on spec + params
- Cross-field validator unchanged
- pre-commit (ruff/format/mypy) passes on touched files

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v -k "spec or params"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["YAML without spec/params blocks loads with both as {}", "YAML with spec+params populates cfg.spec/cfg.params verbatim", "nested dict/list/float/int types preserved", "model_dump round-trip equality"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Orchestrator wiring + ValidationError teardown
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Route `cfg.spec` / `cfg.params` into `GenerateClipStage` and tear down compute when `engine.validate_spec` raises ValidationError.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py:26` (add `ValidationError` to existing errors import)
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py:596-610` (swap empties + wrap `stage.run()` in try/except)
- Test: `tests/core/test_orchestrator.py` (append 3 new tests + ValidationError import)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cfg.spec flows into GenerationJob.spec (observed via FakeEngine spy)
- cfg.params flows into GenerationJob.params
- `dict(cfg.spec)` copy isolates cfg from any stage-side mutation
- ValidationError → resolved_provider.destroy_instance(instance.id) called exactly once when instance exists
- destroy_instance NOT called on requires_compute=False path or on happy path
- pre-commit passes on touched files

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cfg.spec flows into GenerationJob.spec", "cfg.params flows into GenerationJob.params", "dict(...) copy isolates cfg from stage mutations", "ValidationError triggers destroy_instance exactly once when instance exists", "no destroy_instance call on hosted/fal path or happy path"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Strategy precedence regression tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock down two invariants Task 2 relies on but no existing test exercises with non-empty `base_params`: (a) Segment.params segment-wins-merges over non-empty base_params; (b) strategy.decide's `_audio_mode` injection overrides any user-supplied spec._audio_mode.

**Files:**
- Test: `tests/core/test_strategy.py` (append 2 new tests at end of file)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- With base_params={"fps": 24, "steps": 30} and Segment.params={"steps": 50}, merged Segment.params == {"fps": 24, "steps": 50}
- With spec={"_audio_mode": "wrong"}, job.spec["_audio_mode"] is derived from profile.supports_joint_audio, NOT "wrong"
- pre-commit passes

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_strategy.py -v`

**Notes:** Regression locks for behavior already implemented in `strategy.decide`. Should pass on first run. If either fails, do NOT modify strategy.py — flag to user.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/core/test_strategy.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_strategy.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["segment-wins over non-empty base_params", "strategy.decide audio_mode overrides user spec._audio_mode"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: End-to-end YAML round-trip test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock down the full path — real YAML file → load_config → generate() → FakeEngine.validate_spec sees cfg.spec verbatim → artifact persisted to LocalArtifactStore — with a dedicated e2e test independent of unit-scale spies.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/test_e2e_spec_routing.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Writes a real YAML file to tmp_path and loads via load_config(path.read_text())
- generate() returns an Artifact whose uri is a readable file in the store root
- FakeEngine.validate_spec observes job.spec containing the YAML's spec: block keys
- No real network, subprocess, or GPU (FakeEngine + LocalProvider + LocalArtifactStore)
- pre-commit passes

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_e2e_spec_routing.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_e2e_spec_routing.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_e2e_spec_routing.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["real YAML file round-trips through load_config + generate", "FakeEngine.validate_spec observes cfg.spec verbatim", "artifact persisted to LocalArtifactStore"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Example YAML updates + extended example-load tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update hosted.yaml, diffusers.yaml, wan.yaml, fal.yaml to demonstrate the new spec: + params: blocks. Lock down their effective shapes in tests/test_examples.py.

**Files:**
- Modify: examples/configs/hosted.yaml (spec: {model, params} + params: {fps, num_frames, steps}; document engine.hosted.model vs spec.model duplication)
- Modify: examples/configs/diffusers.yaml (spec: {pipeline, scheduler} + params)
- Modify: examples/configs/wan.yaml (spec: {graph, node_overrides} + params; comfyui)
- Modify: examples/configs/fal.yaml (commented-out optional spec/params)
- Untouched: examples/configs/local-fake.yaml
- Modify: tests/test_examples.py (4 new tests on shipped cfg.spec shapes)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All existing example YAMLs still load (no regression in test_example_config_loads)
- hosted/diffusers/wan produce non-empty cfg.spec with the engine's required keys
- fal/local-fake keep cfg.spec == {}
- hosted.yaml comment documents engine.hosted.model vs spec.model duplication
- pre-commit passes

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/hosted.yaml", "examples/configs/diffusers.yaml", "examples/configs/wan.yaml", "examples/configs/fal.yaml", "tests/test_examples.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_examples.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all example YAMLs still load", "hosted/diffusers/wan ship non-empty cfg.spec with required keys", "fal/local-fake keep cfg.spec={}", "hosted.yaml comment documents engine.hosted.model vs spec.model duplication"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: README + PROGRESS.md + full suite gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the new YAML surface, refresh PROGRESS Phase 21 entry, and run the entire test suite as the layer-completion gate.

**Files:**
- Modify: README.md (new "Per-job spec & params" section + quickstart updates for hosted/diffusers/comfyui)
- Modify: PROGRESS.md (Phase 21 entry; mark follow-up #1 closed; restate follow-up #2)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README.md contains a new heading "Per-job spec & params" with per-engine required-keys table
- README.md hosted quickstart shows a spec: + params: block
- PROGRESS.md "Single next action" updated to point at Layer K merge SHA (placeholder until backfill)
- PROGRESS.md line ~154 follow-up #1 closed; follow-up #2 (_artifact_bytes auth) restated as Layer L candidate
- PROGRESS.md gains "Phase 21 — Layer K (spec routing)" subsection under Post-MVP
- `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files` passes
- `pixi run pytest` (full suite) passes — no regression in existing 693 tests

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest 2>&1 | tail -5` + `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files 2>&1 | tail -5`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest && pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README has Per-job spec & params section", "README hosted/diffusers/comfyui quickstarts show spec+params", "PROGRESS Phase 21 entry present", "Single next action updated to point at Layer K", "follow-up #1 closed; #2 restated as Layer L candidate", "full pytest suite passes", "pre-commit all-files passes"]}
```
